title: pinguicula vallis-regiae
intro: Pinguicula vallis-regiae, also known as the Royal Valley Butterwort, is a species of carnivorous plant belonging to the genus Pinguicula, native to Mexico. It contains medicinal properties due to the presence of iridoid glycosides and other bioactive compounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Pinguicula vallis-regiae can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms and promote overall well-being.
